    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class controller.JImpossibleMission

    MAP_ROW - Static variable in class model.level.LevelManager
     
    MapReader - Class in model.util
    Class used to help entities to read the map and it's collisions.

    MENU - Enum constant in enum class view.Navigator.ScreenStates
     
    MenuPanel - Class in view.panel
    Panel to show the main menu (access to Play, Profile, Settings and exiting the game)
